results.title: MEA asks Indian Citizens not to undertake Kailash Manasarovar Yatra without all required travel documents - News On AIR
results.description: MEA asks Indian Citizens not to undertake Kailash Manasarovar Yatra without all required travel documents News On AIR MEA cautions Kailash Mansarovar pilgrims against incomplete travel documents after 52 Indians stranded in Nepal The Times of India India's Ambassador To China Completes Kailash Mansarovar Yatra Parikrama, Shares Key Advice For Pilgrims NDTV Kailash Mansarovar Yatra 2026 begins: A complete guide to the sacred journey, from permits and routes to altitude risks Firstpost 52 Indian pilgrims stranded in Kathmandu during Kailash Mansarovar yatra; NCP (SP) MP Supriya Sule urges MEA, embassies to intervene ANI News

results.title: Akal Takht summons Punjab’s Sikh ministers, MLAs: Why the institution wields such influence
results.description: Few institutions have shaped Sikh religious and political life as profoundly as the Akal Takht. Here is a look at what the Akal Takht is, how its authority evolved and why its summons carry so much weight.

results.title: Iran launches missile, drone strikes on US military sites in Kuwait, Bahrain
results.description: Iran's Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps said early on Sunday that its navy and aerospace forces had launched a joint missile and drone operations targeting US military sites in Kuwait and Bahrain in response to recent US strikes against Iran.

results.title: Biodun Abayomi Oyebanji: Between infrastructure triumphs and critics’ dissent
results.description: Governor Biodun Abayomi Oyebanji’s historic triumph in the recent off-cycle election continues to dominate political discourse in Ekiti State and beyond. His victory does more than just solidify the APC’s dominance, the overwhelming margin of his re-election firmly validates the social contract between his administration and the electorate. The post Biodun Abayomi Oyebanji: Between infrastructure triumphs and critics’ dissent appeared first on The Sun Nigeria .
